details: Frequent reports of water shortage and contamination in rural areas of Rajasthan and Maharashtra.
importance: Crucial for politicians to prioritize Jal Jeevan Mission funds and address immediate public health needs.

details: High volume of complaints regarding potholes and lack of street lighting in suburban areas of Bengaluru and Chennai.
importance: Direct impact on voter satisfaction and local economic activity. Politicians can use this to pressure PWD or Municipal Corporations.
